Title: Sleeping Cat on Books Minimalist Line Art T-Shirt
Description:
Celebrate your love for literature and sleepy companions with this charming line art design. Featuring a cute, curled-up cat napping on a stack of books, this minimalist graphic is perfect for bookworms and cat lovers alike.

The simple, timeless black outline design adds a touch of sweet whimsy to any outfit, making it an ideal gift for students, readers, or anyone who finds comfort in a good book and a furry friend.

  • Comfortable Wear: Printed on a soft, breathable t-shirt perfect for daily casual wear.
  • Design Appeal: The clean line art style offers a sophisticated, understated aesthetic.
  • Gift Idea: Makes a thoughtful and charming present for graduation, book clubs, or cat owners.

Whether you're curled up with a novel or just enjoying a quiet afternoon, this shirt is a perfect way to express your passion.
